The winger spent over 450 days on the sidelines after suffering a serious injury in July 2023. Despite this, the Citizens sent him on a loan to Sparta Rotterdam last summer. arts.ttl: “It is all true” – Agent on Pep Guardiola’s desire to sign client for Manchester City
arts.sum: Manchester City were active in the winter market as they spent over €200m to improve their squad. Their investment would have been much higher had they managed to sign Juventus’ Andrea Cambiaso. The Premier League club showed interest in the left-back but weren’t able to get the transfer over the line. arts.sum: League One club eyeing FA Cup shock in one of the biggest fixtures in their history

arts.ttl: Nico González cannot replace Rodri but will help Manchester City fill the void | Will Unwin
arts.sum: New recruit can help bring solidity to midfield this season and potentially play alongside his compatriot in future If Manchester City supporters are expecting Nico González to be a silver bullet in midfield, they may want to calm their hopes. The 23-year-old Spaniard has arrived from Porto for £50m to help fill the huge hole left by his compatriot Rodri in front of the defence but the former Barcelona man is a very different player. City will need to adapt to him, rather than the other way round, if they are to solve their gaping problem. Pep Guardiola’s and City’s difficulties have been glaringly apparent since Rodri tore a cruciate ligament in September. They have lacked physicality and mobility in midfield, leaving them to endure a dreadful run and arguably the best coach of his generation has been unable to find a solution with what was available to him. González’s welcome to England, and the first test of his capabilities and La Masia upbringing, could come at League One Leyton Orient in the FA Cup on Saturday. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Manchester City Teases Mysterious Oasis Collaboration
arts.sum: Manchester City has sparked intrigue among fans with a cryptic social media post featuring both the club's crest and the iconic Oasis band logo, set for reveal on February 7, 2025.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Myles Lewis-Skelly told he shouldn't be allowed to mock Erling Haaland
